stemHtml:
When an aircraft has been unlawfully interfered with, the state in which the PIC lands is required to inform:

1. State of the operator
2. ICAO
3. State of registration of aircraft
4. EASA
5. States whose citizens suffered fatalities or injuries, or were detained as hostages
6. States whose citizens are Special Categories of Passenger (SCPs)
7. States whose citizens are known to be on board the aircraft
8. UN Counter Terrorism unit

options.d: All on the list except for ICAO.
